item.title: Diesel Trucks to Buy and Not to Buy
item.description: A practical look at diesel trucks, with buying and ownership considerations to help you compare options and spot potential repair concerns.

item.title: Hyundai Sonata Heads to the Junkyard

item.title: Why a 1995 DeVille Still Stands Out

item.title: Maintaining a Reliable Engine
item.description: Engine maintenance tips are covered, focusing on inspections, routine service, and practices that help improve long-term reliability.
